raw.message: 女神からの甘い招待。オールインで応えよ

hook.summary: Provocative anime character close-ups with high-energy Japanese voiceover.
hook.visual_action: Close-up shots of a pink-haired anime girl in a bunny suit licking a lollipop, followed by a suggestive shot of her legs.
hook.text_overlay: HOSHIMIYA KANA CV: 上坂すみれ
hook.voiceover_transcript: あ！会長！大好き！オールイン！

scene_flow: Suggestive close-ups of the pink-haired bunny girl character.
Character splash art with name and voice actress credits.
Gameplay footage of a high-stakes poker 'All-in' move.
Winning 'Royal Flush' hand reveal with character reaction.
End card displaying game title and 'Now Available' text.
on_screen_text: ストロベリーダイキリ
美少女 × ドレス × ポーカー！
audience_proxy: Male anime enthusiasts and mobile gamers who enjoy competitive card games with waifu-style character collection.
